case_title: PETER Y. FOWLER VS. THE CLIFT ROYAL HOTEL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CHANGE ORIGINAL DEFENDANT **FROM**(DISMISS) THE ROYAL CLIFF HOTEL **TO**(ADD) SONESTA CLIFF LLC FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOWLER, PETER Y.

REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF;S DEPARTMENT, 1 DR. CARLTON GOODLETT PLACE, ROOM 456 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PETER FOWLER. DEFENDANT THE CLIFT ROYAL HOTEL (A SONESTA HOTEL) IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RONALD WARD, DIRECTOR OF SAFETY AND SECURITY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
